name: PricingCards
description: A responsive pricing comparison layout with plan cards showing name, price, feature list, and CTA button. Supports highlighting a recommended plan. Common in SaaS agent interfaces.

visual.description: Horizontal row of pricing cards with equal height. Each card shows plan name, price with billing period, feature list with check/cross icons, and a CTA button. The recommended plan has a highlighted border and badge. Cards are responsive and stack on mobile.

props.name: plans
props.description: Array of plan objects with name, price, period, features (array of {text, included}), ctaLabel, and recommended (boolean)
